summary: End-to-end testing of the new 'Parte Semanal' (weekly work report) feature for Carmagne app. Backend extraction endpoint with GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key works correctly; full worker flow (login/register, modal, file upload, AI extraction, submission) and admin Partes panel (status cards, filters, list, detail modal, delete) verified.

issues: 'ADMIN PANEL' link uses text-slate-800 on near-black background — very low contrast / nearly invisible. Acceptable for an admin hidden link but consider slightly brighter color.
Logout uses an icon-only button with no aria-label/title; add aria-label='Cerrar sesión' for accessibility.
Sidebar 'Partes' text appears both in left nav (button) and bottom mobile nav (span). Strict-mode selectors must scope by role; not a user-facing bug but worth noting.

action_items: Optional: add data-testid attributes to phone input, registration name/dni inputs, admin username/password inputs, and 'Admin Panel' / 'Partes' sidebar buttons to make future automation more robust.

Optional: hide Firestore offline warnings in production logs — env shows 'Could not reach Cloud Firestore backend' (offline mode). Data still works via localStorage and submissions persisted correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: extract endpoint correctly strips data URL prefix, handles markdown-wrapped JSON, and gracefully returns {success:false, error} on LLM exceptions. Good defensive parsing.
WeeklyReportModal.tsx (~500 lines): single-file modal manages phases CAPTURE/PREVIEW/EXTRACTING/FORM/SUCCESS — fine but consider splitting into sub-components if it grows further.

weeklyReportService.ts uses import.meta.env.VITE_BACKEND_URL (currently empty -> same-origin /api). Vite proxy works in preview. Production deploys must ensure /api is reverse-proxied to the FastAPI backend.
App.tsx is ~711 lines; should be split into smaller files for maintainability (worker dashboard, admin login modal, registration step are good extraction targets).
Frontend uses native confirm() for new-user registration dialog — replace with a styled modal for consistency.
test_credentials: Admin: admin / admin. Worker test phone used during testing: +34 600999888 (auto-registered as 'Test Usuario' / DNI 12345678Z).
seed_data_creation: 3 weekly reports were created in Firestore/localStorage during testing for 'Test Usuario' (weeks 2026-01-13→19 and 2026-06-15→21). Safe to leave or delete from admin Partes tab.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_weekly_report.py and exercise GPT-4o via real Emergent LLM key (takes ~15-20s due to live LLM call). Public preview URL pattern: https://<id>.preview.emergentagent.com. Frontend uses Vite (not CRA), env var is VITE_BACKEND_URL (empty -> relative /api). Worker login uses Spanish phone format; new numbers trigger a native confirm() dialog -> page.on('dialog', accept). Admin sidebar 'Partes' duplicates in mobile-nav, use get_by_role('button', name='Partes') to avoid strict-mode violation.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Backend extraction returned all 5 fields (weekStart=2026-01-13, weekEnd=2026-01-19, totalHours=37, siteName='Edificio Barakaldo 106', tasks=3 items) from a generated test image. Submission persisted to localStorage even though Firestore was unreachable in preview env (offline-first design works correctly).
